positive: A highly stylized, intricate woodland scene dominated by strong silhouettes of stylized trees, glowing celestial elements, and ethereal forest flora. The composition is centered and balanced, featuring a luminous crescent moon partially obscured by lush, geometrically patterned foliage. The style must mimic detailed, high-contrast vector line art with clean, bold shapes. Use a deeply saturated, limited color palette of midnight blue, forest teal, and stark white accents. The artwork should be clean, minimalist, and highly detailed, designed for flawless reproduction on apparel.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, low resolution, washed out, gradient, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, creepy
